gaps.title: No general Bandit work-item creation command
gaps.rationale: Manual work-item creation remains acceptable during bootstrap, but the gap should be converted once the repeated artifact shape stabilizes.
gaps.next_action: Keep queued until the next work-artifact automation chore is selected.

gaps.title: Bootstrap gaps need repo-native tracking and validation
gaps.rationale: BANDIT-011 created the gap ledger, validation path, default init ledger, and list command.
gaps.next_action: Use bandit validate and bandit gaps list during cold starts, closeout, and future bootstrap-gap routing.

gaps.title: Live CodeRabbit polling and repair orchestration unavailable
gaps.rationale: CodeRabbit evidence can be captured manually, but live API polling, PR comment repair orchestration, and rerun automation need later integration work.
gaps.next_action: Queue a dedicated integration chore when PR-based landing automation starts.

gaps.title: Live escalated adversarial reviewer routing unavailable
gaps.rationale: The placeholder gate exists; live stronger-reviewer routing needs a later reviewer integration chore with cost and credential boundaries.
gaps.next_action: Create a reviewer-routing integration chore when escalation policy needs live execution.

gaps.title: No Landing Agent exists yet
gaps.rationale: Bootstrap landing is recorded manually; final Landing Agent behavior belongs after landing evidence, review gates, and UAT contracts are stable.
gaps.next_action: Keep queued for the Phase 5 auto-landing policy path.

gaps.title: No CLI-owned UAT artifact exists yet
gaps.rationale: UAT is the next Phase 5 capability after bootstrap-gap tracking lands.
gaps.next_action: Start Phase 5 UAT work only after BANDIT-011 lands.

gaps.title: No heartbeat chore-agent exists yet
gaps.rationale: Recurring chore automation should wait until repo-native chore and gate contracts are stronger.
gaps.next_action: Keep queued until chore eligibility and safety policy are explicit.

gaps.title: No workflow cockpit exists yet
gaps.rationale: The cockpit should derive from CLI-owned state after core workflow state and validation paths exist.
gaps.next_action: Keep queued for Phase 7 after CLI authority and derived state contracts are ready.
